---
title: "Frederick Lygon, 6th Earl Beauchamp"
---

## Frederick Lygon, 6th Earl Beauchamp

**Dates:** (1830-1891)

### Description

landowner

### Biography

He succeeded his brother in 1866 and married, first (18 Feb 1868), Lady Mary Catherine Stanhope (d. 30 June 1876), and, secondly (24 Sept 1878), Lady Emily A C Pierrepoint (d. 1935).

### Letters

- Letter from May 1st 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
